positive: A maximalist, highly detailed botanical illustration of bioluminescent flora and ethereal forest spirits. The main elements feature complex, stylized roots, glowing crystal structures, and delicate fauna with elegant silhouettes, reminiscent of stained glass and vintage natural history plates. Use a palette dominated by deep sapphire blues, glowing teal, vibrant magentas, and stark white accents, set against a contrasting deep indigo background. The composition must be balanced, symmetrical, and highly graphic, suitable for repeating as a seamless apparel print. Intricate linework, scientific illustration style mixed with cosmic fantasy, studio lighting, perfect anti-aliasing.
negative: blur, low quality, jpeg artifacts, signature, watermark, text, logo, typeface, blurry, bad anatomy, disfigured, extra limbs, fused fingers, poorly drawn, out of frame, tiling, sketch, grayscale, photo, realistic photo, noise
